subcodes.first_line: O noble fruit! When thou gazest upon the contingent world, every soul is the fruit of a tree, and every plant is the flower of a meadow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثمره طیبه چون در عالم امکان نگری هر نفسی ثمر شجریست و هر نبتی کل چمنی ثمر
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
